description: O-Framework 1 voice persona contract. Voice PRs must keep these IDs, cadence, confirmation behavior, and interruption targets stable or update this file intentionally with reviewer context.

delta_test.fixture: Greg asks what needs attention before the morning briefing.
assertions: voice_id remains deepgram:aura-2-juno-en unless the PR explicitly migrates Orca TTS
speaking_rate remains 1.0x for production Orca turns
confirmation_behavior stays brief-operational: answer the operational ask without warm-up chatter
barge_in_latency_target_ms remains <=350 for Orca interruption proof

delta_test.fixture: Greg asks Ivy to add a garden note and stop talking mid-reply.
assertions: voice_id remains deepgram:aura-2-juno-en for Ivy relay turns
speaking_rate remains 1.18x so Ivy keeps the faster estate-assistant cadence
confirmation_behavior stays explicit-action-summary for mutations and logs
barge_in_latency_target_ms remains <=500 for Ivy stop/barge-in controls

delta_test.fixture: Parent asks Obi-Wan for a short family-plan check-in.
assertions: voice_id remains deepgram:aura-2-thalia-en until ob1-parents migrates its relay
speaking_rate remains 1.0x for calm parent-facing replies
confirmation_behavior stays silent-unless-action to avoid unnecessary confirmations
barge_in_latency_target_ms remains <=500 for parent voice interruption

delta_test.fixture: Greg asks the AgentOps voice bridge to summarize blocked work.
assertions: voice_id remains openai:alloy for OpenAI Realtime unless the PR updates the bridge env contract
speaking_rate remains 1.0x for orchestrator voice bridge replies
confirmation_behavior stays brief-operational and routes operational work through orchestrator_request
